codes.description: No terminal condition was emitted for the slot.
codes.name: NONE

codes.description: The player died and the episode terminated.
codes.name: PLAYER_DEATH

codes.description: The player completed Fight Caves and emitted the success terminal.
codes.name: CAVE_COMPLETE

codes.description: The episode reached its configured tick cap and truncated.
codes.name: TICK_CAP

codes.description: The runtime detected a state invariant violation and aborted the slot.
codes.name: INVALID_STATE

codes.description: Oracle/reference validation aborted the slot before a gameplay terminal.
codes.name: ORACLE_ABORT
